$comment: Timestamps are RFC 3339-profiled (ADR-0017); validators in every language MUST assert format: date-time.
title: DecisionResponse
description: KnoTrust DecisionResponse contract v1 (P0-E2-T1). Language-neutral mirror of packages/core/src/contract.ts's DecisionResponse, Outcome, ApprovalState, and ApprovalHandleRef. The core returns exactly four outcomes ([KNOTRUST], stable; brief §E2): allow, deny, pending_approval (AARP-shaped task handle; AARP's mechanism is called "Requestable Denial", the draft's own front matter abbreviates the profile "ARAP"), deferred_not_eligible. AuthZEN 1.0's core decision is a bare boolean [STANDARD]; these two extra outcomes are translated only at adapters.

reasonAdmin.description: Audit-only; may name policy ids, matched rules.

requestable.description: Present iff outcome === "deny" and the denial is requestable (sensitive tier, no covering grant): actionable, injection-conscious guidance — never policy internals. (R9, P0-E2-T2)

how.description: Exact CLI invocation template, e.g. "knotrust grant --tool <tool> --server <server>".

ApprovalState.description: Architecture §6.1 approval orchestrator lifecycle enum, verbatim.

ApprovalHandleRef.description: Core-side reference to an approval task handle (maps to AARP task handle at the adapter).

expiresAt.description: ISO-8601; deadline after which the approval resolves as deny.
